title: AK CASC climate adaptation training brings tribal communities together
summary: As severe weather increases across Alaska, climate adaptation in rural Alaska is a growing task for Alaska tribes. Last month, a cohort representing twelve Alaska tribal communities across western and interior Alaska gathered at the International Arctic Research Center to attend a Tribal Climate Adaptation 101 training led by the Alaska Tribal Resilience Learning Network within the Alaska Climate Adaptatio...
